name: AWS EventBridge Unsuccessful Enumeration For Possible Cross Account IDs
description: Detects unsuccessful enumeration of AWS EventBridge event buses and their associated targets, which indicates an attacker may be mapping the event routing configuration in the event buses potentially to identify opportunities for cross-account event forwarding, data exfiltration, or establishing persistence.
